# Feature With Tasks

## Overview

This fixture includes both spec.md and tasks.md for testing task parsing.

## User Stories

### US1: Task Management

As a developer, I want to track implementation tasks so that I can monitor progress.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] Tasks can be parsed from tasks.md
- [ ] Task checkboxes are detected
- [ ] Task dependencies are tracked
